text:
There once was a little girl named Clara who lived at the edge of an old owl woods.

One autumn afternoon she noticed things weren't quite right.

Birds that could talk stayed quiet.

Oranges that shouldn't fall until March.

She knew owls couldn't speak.

But something was pulling them toward her.

She followed the scent.

It led her inside.

An old owl settled beside her.

She whispered why she came.

He just blinked.

That night they flew back to the woods.

And that's what animals say when they cherish someone.

Great owl. Great friend.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
